subject: [SDC] WIP - Update to Testsuite image
commit_message:
[SDC] WIP - Update to Testsuite image

SDC 1.7 images require an updated testsuite to pass through oom gating,
this can be updated later to proper release images.
running staging images through gating to make sure nothing broke
in testsuite.

Issue-ID: SDC-3076
Signed-off-by: Krystian Kedron <k.kedron@partner.samsung.com>
Change-Id: I496ee4f63def228cca5783127d69aee08028c27f
Signed-off-by: ChrisC <christophe.closset@intl.att.com>

entries.message:

Gitlab controller: Deployment put on queue, number 4 on the queue.

Patch Set 2: Commit message was updated.
